raw_text: kueh tze hao no. 4, 12 villas, lorong kedandi 12 93350, kuching, sarawak (+60 16 891 6888) tzehaokueh@gmail.com objective highly motivated aerospace engineer seeking for a position in a reputable master program collaborated between uc3m and airbus to further enhance in-depth knowledge in engineering industry by applying my leadership, analytical, communication and teamwork skills to provide innovative ideas and solutions towards aerospace organization. professional experience velocity composites sdn. bhd. may 2018-current (cyberjaya, malaysia) composite project engineer full time primary tasks: e creating bespoke composite products for aerospace industry. e integrating with customers engineering team to ensure a robust product design is produced with the aim of first time right. e design an innovative kit, delivery and package media to interface with customer production plant. e provide technical support for the customer such as tier one manufacturer of component parts for top aircraft manufacturer. e determines project specifications by reviewing customer requirements, product design, and preparing cost estimates. airbus operations gmbh oct 2016- nov 2017 (hamburg, germany) a330neo stress analyst intern full time primary tasks: e primary structure mechanical system installations analysis on a330neo and a350xwb crossbeams. e project support for a330neo ground test campaign for fuselage section 15a. plausibility check of strain and stress measurements at door corner, longitudinal splice p17, torsion box and door frames. e design concept study for rapid development team (sprint) on modular hatrack cabin brackets. e design and structure analysis support in thor (test of hi-tech objectives in reality) rapid architecture demonstrator drone. the main target for the support was to improve the behavior of the main landing gear structure during maximum loading conditions (landing). education bachelor of aerospace engineering (honours) completed in 2018 rmit university (melbourne, australia) e graduated with 1% class honours associated degree in technology (mechanical) completed in 2014 rmit university (melbourne, australia) e successfully achieved a distinction average south australian matriculation completed in 2012 taylors college sri hartamas (kuala lumpur, malaysia) equivalent to year 12 professional skills e computer: proficient in microsoft word, excel, powerpoint. e language: fluent in english, mandarin, foochow, hokkien and malay. e driving: full driving license since 2011 e proficient with catia and autocad as it was heavily used for designing through various projects during university and also recent employment. e familiar with mathlab as engineering mathematics and aerospace dynamics and controls subjects. e proficient with patran and nastran for finite element analysis during the employment in airbus. professional membership e engineers australia since 2015 e royal aeronautical society since 2016 extra-curricular activities aug australia education expo 2014 volunteer e assisted with the program with all the preparation works e communicated with leaders from various prestige universities which had enhanced my communication skills e coordinated all the university representatives to respective booths which improved my organisational skills. make a difference united (madu), malaysia volunteer e a mentoring program in taylors college sri hartamas e mentored underprivileged refugees (8-12 years old) which developed my leadership skills. e provided care and support by counseling the refugees which indirectly provided me the chance to exchange culture and beliefs. malaysians in hamburg founder e to provide a network of support for new and potential malaysian migrants regarding moving to, living and settling down in hamburg (and germany in general) e to facilitate the organising of social gatherings/meet ups for malaysians in hamburg interests e hands on things for example repairing electrical components e 3d printing prototyping / rapid prototyping e plane spotting e exploring new country and culture (for eg. went on solo trip to cambodia, vietnam and bangkok during summer
